user.title: Connect Dreame lawn mower
user.description: Sign in with your Dreamehome or MOVAhome account to discover mower devices.

reauth.title: Reconnect account
reauth.description: Update your Dreamehome or MOVAhome credentials.

error.2fa_required: Two-factor authentication must be completed in the vendor app or website before setup can continue.
error.cannot_auth: The account login failed. Check the username, password, account type, and region.
error.cannot_connect: Home Assistant could not reach the Dreame or MOVA cloud. Check network access and try again.
error.invalid_account_type: The selected account type is not supported by this integration.
error.invalid_region: The selected region was rejected by the cloud. Check the account region used in the vendor app.
error.no_devices: No supported lawn mower devices were found for this account. Check that the selected region and account type match the vendor app.
